title: जाओ और सिखाओ
author: Traditional

scriptureRefs.note: Go ye therefore, and teach all nations
Ye shall be witnesses unto me both in Jerusalem, and in all Judaea

story: A stirring missionary bhajan from the Hindi-speaking church tradition. This hymn echoes the Great Commission and has inspired countless believers to share the gospel across North India and beyond. It is a beloved anthem at mission conferences and commissioning services.

lines: जाओ और सिखाओ सब जातियों को
दुनिया के कोने कोने में जाओ
linesRomanized: Jao aur sikhaao sab jaatiyon ko
Duniyaa ke kone kone mein jao

lines: हर भाषा में हर देश में
linesRomanized: Har bhaashaa mein har desh mein
